## Discussion

This key is optional when saving a record; otherwise, this key is required. See [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/DataManagement/Conceptual/CloudKitWebServicesReference/Types.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015240-CH3-SW1] for the JavaScript types you should use for the values of schema field types.

# type

**Instance Property**

The type of the field.

## Declaration

```swift
attribute String type;
```

## Discussion

This key is optional when saving a record; otherwise, this key is required. See [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/DataManagement/Conceptual/CloudKitWebServicesReference/Types.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015240-CH3-SW1] for the JavaScript types you should use for the values of schema field types.
